questions.question: What inner conflict does Paul describe in this chapter?
options: Wanting to follow Jewish customs vs Gentile customs
Wanting to do good but doing evil instead
Wanting to preach but being afraid
Wanting to go to Rome but being prevented
questions.answer: Wanting to do good but doing evil instead

questions.question: Paul says the Law itself is what?
Paul claims he always successfully does the good that he wants to do.
For what I want to do, I don't do; but what I _____, that I practice.
Wretched man that I am! Who will deliver me out of the body of this _____?
